# fly_postgres_attachment (Resource)

Attaches a Fly.io Postgres cluster to an app. Import using postgres_app/app.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_postgres_attachment" "example" {
  postgres_app  = fly_postgres_cluster.example.name
  app           = fly_app.example.name
  database_name = "my_app_db"
  variable_name = "DATABASE_URL"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The app to attach. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `postgres_app` (String) The name of the Postgres app. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `database_name` (String) The database name to use for the attachment. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `variable_name` (String) The environment variable name for the connection URI. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `connection_uri` (String, Sensitive) The connection URI set on the app.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the attachment (postgres_app/app).
